title: Weekly Strategic Workflow — Phase 30
weekly_review_actions: review money page performance (impressions, clicks, position changes)
review first content clicks (any non-brand clicks?)
review indexing movement (new indexed high-value pages?)
review monetization status (any progress toward approval?)
kill actions that failed (0 results after measurement window)
double down on actions that moved metrics
choose next 8-page priority set only if current set improves

zero_content_clicks_14_days.action: rewrite top 3 page titles/intros, tighten query targeting, check snippet alignment

zero_replies_20_sends.action: kill that channel, pivot to next free PR channel, document learnings

zero_indexing_movement_21_days.trigger: 0 high-value page indexing movement after 21 days
zero_indexing_movement_21_days.action: strengthen internal links to those pages, reduce low-value sitemap noise, verify no technical blocks

impression_decline_2_weeks.action: run full content quality + indexing + technical audit, identify root cause

no_ad_approval.trigger: no ad network approval despite readiness
no_ad_approval.action: run monetization compliance audit, fix gaps, reapply
